de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label

Class TermLabelManager.TermLabelConfiguration

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label.TermLabelManager.TermLabelConfiguration
  • Enclosing class:
    TermLabelManager

    public static final class TermLabelManager.TermLabelConfiguration
extends Object
    Instances of this class are used to group everything which is required to support one specific TermLabel.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private ImmutableList<TermLabelPolicy> applicationTermPolicies
      The TermLabelPolicy instances applied on the application term.
      private ImmutableList<ChildTermLabelPolicy> childAndGrandchildTermLabelPolicies
      The child and grandchild ChildTermLabelPolicy instances to use.
      private ImmutableList<ChildTermLabelPolicy> directChildTermLabelPolicies
      The direct ChildTermLabelPolicy instances to use.
      private TermLabelFactory<?> factory
      The TermLabelFactory to use.
      private ImmutableList<TermLabelPolicy> modalityTermPolicies
      The TermLabelPolicy instances applied on the modality term.

      The TermLabelMerger instance.
      private Name termLabelName
      The Name of the supported TermLabel.
      private ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> termLabelRefactorings
      The TermLabelRefactoring instances.
      private ImmutableList<TermLabelUpdate> termLabelUpdates
      The TermLabelUpdate instances.

        factory - The TermLabelFactory to use.

        directChildTermLabelPolicies - The direct ChildTermLabelPolicy instances to use.
